Headline: #94 California Temporary Southbound Reroute near California/Division
ShortDescription: Southbound 94 California buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near California/Division.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #94 California buses are temporarily rerouted via California, Division, Kedzie, Chicago, Sacramento, and over to normal route, due to street blockage near California/Division.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
